quoteLast: Murchison will launch the electric spark on the wire which communicates with the charge of the Columbiad.
title: From the Earth to the Moon, Direct in Ninety-Seven Hours and Twenty Minutes: and a Trip Round It

title: An Old Coachman's Chatter, with Some Practical Remarks on Driving
author: Corbett, Edward, 1817-1895; Sturgess, J. (John), 1839-1903 [Illustrator]

quoteFirst: "My friends," said he, "it is twenty minutes past ten; at
quoteLast: Murchison will set fire to the Columbiad; at that minute precisely we shall leave our spheroid. We have, therefore, still seven-and-twenty minutes to remain upon earth."
title: The Moon-Voyage
author: Verne, Jules, 1828-1905
